## Source: amazon-inspector (ceaf1cee13e367f987a97f8de4c8fb4985ab1eedd49be1912467793dce9f0ef9)
The package bizsignupnodeweb was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (db21d1edf6c7a5e050edd0345bd644bb382ab3fc3098d3ec5c1be1ed26761739)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bizsignupnodeweb' @ 99.11.9 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
